##: MOCK / PERSONAL scoop manifest for reWASD — NOT for the official scoop bucket.
Every value tagged PLACEHOLDER below must be verified before this will install.
1) version: PLACEHOLDER — set to the real current reWASD version (check rewasd.com).
2) url/hash: PLACEHOLDER — reWASD has no openly published stable versioned download URL.
Real installer is behind the download button on https://www.rewasd.com/ , historically
under https://www.rewasd.com/uploads/... or a CDN host. Replace url, then run:
scoop hash <url>  and paste the SHA256 into hash. Until then scoop refuses to install.
is the typical Inno set but MUST be verified (NSIS=/S, MSI=/qn).
4) checkver/autoupdate: best-effort; verify regex + url against the live page.
License is Commercial / proprietary (paid) — this only automates install, not licensing.
description: reWASD — advanced gamepad, keyboard and mouse remapper (commercial, proprietary).
notes: reWASD is COMMERCIAL — installing does not license it. Launch reWASD and activate your subscription.
If install failed on a hash error, the url+hash are still placeholders — fill in the real download URL and its SHA256.
If reWASD did not appear, verify the silent flags — may be /S (NSIS) or /qn (MSI) instead of Inno /VERYSILENT.
reWASD installs a driver/service and may require a reboot for controller hiding.
